_comment: Milestone 2.1: restores the original four-project structure of solid_wood_floor_photo_gallery from the raw source (build/raw-source/solid_wood_floor_photo_gallery.html), which the previous flat photo grid had collapsed. Headings, intro/outro prose, and per-project sourcing lines are the original page's own text. Each project lists its images by src in original order; the builder joins them with the byte-identical alt text kept in images.json (the frozen extraction). The four legacy image-button records in images.json (NEXT PAGE BUTTON 2025, CONTACT US BETTER BUTTON 2025, ABOUT US 2025 BUTTON, HOME BUTTON 2025) are deliberately excluded from generated output.

intro.heading: Craftsman-Level Hardwood Floors — Nailed Down or Glued to Concrete, Built to Last
intro.body: San Diego Hardwoods specializes in the installation, sanding, and finishing of real solid wood strip and plank flooring, along with unfinished engineered wood floors glued to concrete. We offer custom colors, square-edge unfinished engineered wide plank flooring for perfectly flat surfaces, and a 100% dust containment option for cleaner, safer work. See examples of our recent projects in the gallery below, including hand-selected rift and quartered white oak chosen for its natural beauty and durability.

sourcing.heading: Buy Premium Solid & Engineered Hardwood Flooring Direct — Complete Material Sourcing and Expert Installation
sourcing.body: Eliminate the showroom markup. When you buy your solid or engineered wood flooring material directly through us, you get premium mill-direct quality backed by 35+ years of local expertise. We source high-grade lumber from trusted mills that far exceeds big-box store quality, and we handle the precise climate acclimation required for San Diego’s unique coastal and inland environments. Whether you need traditional solid wood or high-spec engineered wide planks for concrete slabs, we supply the premium materials and provide the flawless installation all in one seamless package.
sourcing.note: See a style you love below? We source these exact premium mill-direct hardwoods and high-spec engineered planks directly for your project—saving you the retail showroom markup.

outro: Since 1990, San Diego Hardwoods has installed and restored solid and unfinished engineered wood floors with custom colors, dust-free sanding, and Bona-certified craftsmanship. Serving all of San Diego County — from La Jolla and Mission Hills to Rancho Santa Fe and Coronado. Call today.

projects.heading: San Diego Hardwood Floor Installation · 3"×3/4" Select-Grade Rift & Quartered White Oak · Custom Sand Dune Stain + Bona Traffic HD Matte Finish
projects.note: Nail-down installation of Graff Brothers solid rift and quartered white oak, staged on tar paper underlayment, then sanded, stained in a custom sand dune color, and finished with Bona Traffic HD matte.

projects.heading: San Diego Real Wood Flooring Contractor · 2¼" Rift & Quartered White Oak · Custom Light Stain + Bona Matte Finish
projects.note: Looking to buy this exact style? Skip the distributor markup—we source and deliver these premium real wood planks directly for your project. This Mission Hills historical-home kitchen was taken down to the subfloor, then nailed down with rift and quartered select-grade oak matched to the home's original hardwood, including new solid 1" oak stair treads.

projects.heading: Install Solid White Oak Hardwood Floors in San Diego · 2¼" Rift & Quartered · Natural Finish with Bona Traffic HD Satin
projects.note: Want to buy this exact look? We source premium, mill-direct solid white oak and high-grade planks directly for your project at contractor pricing. This vintage Mission Hills cottage received solid rift and quartered select-grade white oak laid over tar paper underlayment, nailed down, sanded flat, and finished natural — no stain — with Bona Traffic HD satin.

projects.heading: Nail Down Hardwood Floor Installation San Diego · 2¼" Red Oak Plainsawn · Custom Water-Based Sealer + Bona Matte Finish
projects.note: Get direct access to mill pricing — we supply and deliver top-tier red oak and traditional domestic hardwood materials seamlessly for your home. Solid select-grade red oak nailed down in a North County bedroom and office, aligned seamlessly with the existing hallway floors, then finished with a light custom water-based sealer and Bona Traffic HD matte.
